summary: PR 2229 matched and linked the Event Yoshi Egg item translation unit by implementing several functions in src/melee/it/items/itevyoshiegg.c, adding item-specific attrs/vars types, updating item var union and prototypes, renaming two address-style symbols to itEvYoshiEgg names, changing the object from NonMatching to Matching, and adjusting local .sdata2 symbol labels. Bot report shows five new matches for the itevyoshiegg unit.

key_files.role: Primary decomp source: added ItemStateTable, implemented itEvYoshiEgg_Spawn, itEvyoshiegg_UnkMotion5_Anim, static inline dmgReceived, and itEvYoshiEgg_Logic42_DmgReceived; replaced borrowed bombhei item var access with evyoshiegg item vars.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: src/melee/it/items/itevyoshiegg.c hunks
text_corpus: decomp-dev bot report lists itEvYoshiEgg_Logic42_DmgReceived, itEvYoshiEgg_Spawn, .data, itEvyoshiegg_UnkMotion5_Anim, .sdata2 as new matches

what_changed: Linked src/melee/it/items/itevyoshiegg.c as Matching in configure.py.
Implemented itEvYoshiEgg_Spawn with SpawnItem setup for It_Kind_EvYoshiEgg, item creation, initialization, and xDD4 state reset.
Implemented itEvyoshiegg_UnkMotion5_Anim as a countdown handler that calls gm_801BEB68(1) when xDD8 equals 40 and returns true when the timer reaches zero.

Implemented itEvYoshiEgg_Logic42_DmgReceived with guards on xDD4 and xC9C versus special attributes, two efSync_Spawn calls, Item_8026AE84, and a helper that hides the JObj, zeroes velocity, sets item vars, and changes state.
Added item-specific itEvYoshiEgg_DatAttrs and itEvYoshiEgg_ItemVars types and added evyoshiegg to the Item item-var union.
Replaced a previous borrowed bombhei item-var access in itEvYoshiEgg_Logic42_Spawned with the new evyoshiegg union arm.
Updated public prototypes and symbol names for itEvYoshiEgg_Spawn and itEvYoshiEgg_Logic42_DmgReceived.
Adjusted three .sdata2 float symbols from global address-style names to local labels.
smart_moves: Recovered a dedicated evyoshiegg item-var union arm before using xDD4/xDD8 fields, avoiding the earlier comment-backed borrow of bombhei.xDD4.
Propagated renamed functions through symbols, header prototypes, item logic table references, and comments in the related it_3F14.c table excerpt.
Changed configure.py to Matching only alongside bot evidence showing the itevyoshiegg object gained new 100% matches.

decomp_lessons.lesson: When matching item code that uses xDD4 item vars, add the correct item-specific ItemVars union arm instead of reusing an unrelated item arm.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: itCommonItems.h added itEvYoshiEgg_ItemVars
raw_diff: types.h added xDD4_itemVar.evyoshiegg
raw_diff: itevyoshiegg.c replaced xDD4_itemVar.bombhei.xDD4 with xDD4_itemVar.evyoshiegg.xDD4

decomp_lessons.lesson: For a newly matched item translation unit, keep the function naming, header prototypes, symbol table entries, and logic table references synchronized in the same PR.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: symbols.txt renamed it_8029B0C8 and it_3F14_Logic42_DmgReceived
raw_diff: itevyoshiegg.h updated prototypes
raw_diff: it_2725.c updated logic table reference

naming_conventions.convention: Event Yoshi Egg item functions use the itEvYoshiEgg_ prefix for named logic/spawn handlers, while pre-existing motion functions in this slice retain itEvyoshiegg_UnkMotionN_* casing.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: symbols.txt itEvYoshiEgg_Spawn and itEvYoshiEgg_Logic42_DmgReceived
raw_diff: itevyoshiegg.c ItemStateTable entries use itEvyoshiegg_UnkMotion0/3/2/4/5 names

naming_conventions.convention: Use local short names ip/gobj for item and object parameters/locals when the role is clear.

raw_diff: itEvYoshiEgg_Logic42_DmgReceived declares Item* ip = GET_ITEM(gobj)

rejection_notes: Do not infer that xDD4 or xDD8 have semantic names beyond the raw field names; the PR kept xDD4/xDD8.
Do not treat the local .sdata2 label changes as a general rule to localize floats; this slice only shows it was done for three symbols in this unit and matched according to the bot report.
Do not claim human reviewer approval or requested changes; the loaded slice has no human review comments.
